title: SNS Topic
description: Managed pub/sub messaging service. Publishes messages to multiple subscribers simultaneously — Lambda, SQS, HTTP endpoints, email, or SMS. Fan-out pattern made simple.
practices: Use SNS → SQS fan-out instead of SNS → Lambda directly. SQS gives you retry, batching, and dead-letter queues.
Enable message filtering on subscriptions to route messages to the right consumers without custom logic.
For cross-account publishing, use resource-based policies on the topic.
SNS is accessed via IAM — compute resources need sns:Publish permission.
configNotes: Choose Standard (high throughput, best-effort ordering) or FIFO (strict ordering, deduplication).
FIFO topics can only deliver to SQS FIFO queues.
